businesses.name: Tomoca Coffee
businesses.shortDescription: Ethiopia's iconic coffee stop with the city rhythm still intact.
businesses.longDescription: A reliable stop for macchiatos, roasted beans, and that familiar standing-counter rhythm that locals move through every day.

businesses.name: Kaldi's Coffee
businesses.shortDescription: A polished cafe stop for meetings, catch-ups, and dependable coffee runs.
businesses.longDescription: A familiar Addis cafe format with easy seating, coffee standards people know, and a practical location for everyday routines.

businesses.name: Yod Abyssinia
businesses.shortDescription: Dinner, performance, and a polished big-night-out atmosphere.
businesses.longDescription: Known for Ethiopian dining paired with dance and music programming, with a menu that works for groups and visitors.

businesses.name: Sishu Mexico
businesses.shortDescription: Stylish all-day dining with a menu broad enough for mixed groups.
businesses.longDescription: A contemporary restaurant-cafe hybrid that is popular for lunch meetings, relaxed dinners, and dependable coffee service.

businesses.name: Fendika Cultural Center
businesses.shortDescription: One of the city's most memorable places for art, music, and movement.
businesses.longDescription: An iconic cultural venue with live performances and a strong sense of local creative identity.

businesses.name: Bilo's Piassa
businesses.shortDescription: A dependable pastry and coffee stop that locals recommend often.
businesses.longDescription: A bakery-led neighborhood favorite for quick meetings, takeaway pastries, and an easy everyday routine.

businesses.name: Skylight Hotel Addis
businesses.shortDescription: A polished hotel stay with business-friendly amenities and a wide campus feel.
businesses.longDescription: One of the city's best-known large-format hotels, popular for conferences, airport convenience, and weekend staycations.
businesses.address: Bole International Airport Road, Addis Ababa

businesses.name: Harmony Spa & Wellness
businesses.shortDescription: Calm treatment rooms and a softer luxury feel in central Addis.
businesses.longDescription: A spa-focused experience for massages, facials, and quiet reset time without leaving the city.

businesses.name: Findfine Fitness
businesses.shortDescription: A brighter gym floor with modern machines and a steady after-work crowd.
businesses.longDescription: Known for approachable trainers, cleaner equipment zones, and convenient class timings for regulars.

businesses.name: Gleam Beauty Salon
businesses.shortDescription: A dependable beauty stop for blowouts, nails, and event-ready styling.
businesses.longDescription: A polished salon experience with strong repeat clientele and a reputation for steady service.

businesses.name: Atlas Barber Studio
businesses.shortDescription: Sharp fades, clean lines, and a consistent neighborhood regular crowd.
businesses.longDescription: A barber shop built around quick service, reliable cuts, and a straightforward booking rhythm.

businesses.name: Beteseb Family Clinic
businesses.shortDescription: A neighborhood clinic known for practical care and clear communication.
businesses.longDescription: A local clinic focused on general consultations, pediatric care, and dependable daytime service.

businesses.name: Summit Pharmacy
businesses.shortDescription: A trusted pharmacy stop for essentials, prescriptions, and quick advice.
businesses.longDescription: A practical neighborhood pharmacy with a strong regular customer base and useful late-day convenience.

businesses.name: Lideta Auto Care
businesses.shortDescription: Straightforward maintenance, diagnostics, and repeat local trust.
businesses.longDescription: A car service business known for practical fixes, clear explanations, and steady turnaround times.

businesses.name: Tutu Noodles
businesses.shortDescription: Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town.
businesses.longDescription: Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town.Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town. Best noodles in town.

businesses.name: Hebir Ethiopia
businesses.shortDescription: The best food in town. Great drinks with good vibes.
businesses.longDescription: Hebir Ethiopia (also spelled Hibir or Hebir Etiopia) is a well-known multi-concept venue in the Bole area of Addis Ababa, Ethiopia. It is particularly famous for its traditional Ethiopian cuisine, but it also caters to international tastes with a diverse menu and different atmospheres under one roof.

reviews.title: The pace feels very Addis
reviews.body: Fast service, great macchiato, and the kind of place that still feels anchored in the city.

reviews.title: Reliable stop before meetings
reviews.body: Easy coffee run with the usual crowd. Beans were fresh and the service moved quickly.

reviews.title: Best for hosting visitors
reviews.body: The performance element makes it memorable, and the whole experience feels polished.

reviews.title: Big energy, a little loud
reviews.body: Great for a celebratory dinner. Expect a lively room and plan ahead for peak time.

reviews.title: Solid lunch meeting choice
reviews.body: The menu works for mixed preferences and the setting feels current without trying too hard.

reviews.title: Good, but timing slipped
reviews.body: Nice room and friendly team, though service slowed down during the lunch rush.

reviews.title: A real city highlight
reviews.body: If you want something specific to Addis rather than generic nightlife, this is the kind of place to start.

reviews.title: Pastries worth repeating
reviews.body: Simple, easy, and consistently good for a quick catch-up or coffee break.

reviews.title: Morning favorite
reviews.body: Friendly staff and the kind of bakery that gets recommended by locals for a reason.

reviews.title: Should not count yet
reviews.body: This review is pending and intentionally excluded from the public score.

reviews.title: Removed review
reviews.body: This review exists to prove removed content does not affect ratings.

reviews.title: Smooth stay for airport access
reviews.body: Easy for conferences and travel days, with enough amenities to make longer stays comfortable too.

reviews.title: Quiet, polished, and easy to recommend
reviews.body: Relaxing rooms and a service style that feels calm instead of rushed.

reviews.title: Good floor, strong equipment mix
reviews.body: A gym that feels current and clean, especially if you go outside the busiest evening hour.

reviews.title: Reliable for events and weekends
reviews.body: Friendly team and a look that stayed polished all day without feeling overly formal.

reviews.title: Quick cut, very solid finish
reviews.body: Exactly the kind of neighborhood barber you want when you need something clean without a long wait.

reviews.title: Straightforward and reassuring
reviews.body: Good communication, practical care, and an overall experience that felt organized from start to finish.

reviews.title: Helpful late in the day
reviews.body: A pharmacy that feels useful precisely because it is fast, familiar, and easy to navigate.

reviews.title: Honest explanations and fair timing
reviews.body: The team walked through the problem clearly and did not overcomplicate what needed to be fixed.

reviews.title: Easy place to work for an hour
reviews.body: Good coffee, decent seating, and the kind of cafe that makes quick meetings very easy to pull off.

reports.details: This review mentions details that do not match the current business experience.
The owner reply feels more like advertising than a direct response to the review.
This private message keeps repeating a promotion instead of addressing the review feedback.

ownerReviewReplies.body: Thanks for the thoughtful review. We have been improving the seating layout and appreciate you calling out the work-friendly atmosphere.

messages.body: Thanks again for the review. If you visit next week, ask for the quieter corner table near the window.
We also have a weekday coffee pass running this month if you are around Bole often.
